title: leea heterodoxa
intro: Leea heterodoxa, also known as Leea indica or Leea rubra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Vitaceae. It is a climber with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin infections, making it beneficial for respiratory and skin health. In herbal preparations, Leea heterodoxa is often used as a decoction or infusion to treat these conditions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat other ailments such as diarrhea and rheumatism.
